Message:
You're a star, Kim. Keep your chin up. Let's try to get the gang together in December. I think we all need a serious blowout weekend.
EM

 -----Original Message-----
From: 	Ward, Kim S (Houston)  
Sent:	Monday, October 29, 2001 10:31 AM
To:	Mainzer, Elliot
Subject:	RE: 

PLEASE take me with you.  I am at a low in my life - recently reassured that I am a failure in relationships that really mean something to me.  The only point in my life where I can't seem to be successful.  

 -----Original Message-----
From: 	Mainzer, Elliot  
Sent:	Monday, October 29, 2001 12:12 PM
To:	Ward, Kim S (Houston)
Subject:	

How are you? Holding on for dear life? I've never needed a sailing trip worse in my life!
